creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Apologies for the duplication. 

If this bug affects you and I alone: I wonder what we have in common. 

> … wasn't able to create a core dump …

The same for me. From bug 240418 comment 7: 

> …
> (ada0:ahcich0:0:0:0): Error 5, Retries exhausted
> …

----

Re: bug 234878, I wonder whether this type of panic will be reproducible with 6.1 …
